data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for privacy-first storage of sensitive identifiers.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for privacy-first storage of sensitive identifiers, specifically mentioning that they should be hashed where needed. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding the actual implementation of this requirement. Without concrete evidence confirming or denying the privacy-first storage of sensitive identifiers, the validation is blocked.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of privacy-first storage of sensitive identifiers.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for privacy-first storage implementation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete checks that verify the hashing and storage of sensitive identifiers.
